title: STAM-MAS Create Modpack
body: ![Title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc4a118a8bd08222c1f2949fc6f6e80e548810ae.png) STAM-MAS, Create Pack, a Minecraft modpack designed to unleash your creativity, wheter you're a builder, redstoner or casual adventurer. With a strong focus on the Create Mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 but with a TWIST the entire world is covered in snow with new mods focused around a winter theme. Curated by Stam1o and DevonG, this pack enhances the Create experience with numerous addons. Alongside Create, you'll find a selection of quality of life and building focused mods. For builders, Chipped provides an extensive block palette complimented by an array of decoration mods and with extra winter themed mods you can create your dream winter wonderland! ## Main mods: - Create - A bunch of Addons for Create - Winter themed mods - Farmers Delight - EMI - Chipped - Detail Mods such as Amendments, Supplementaries and more - Performance mods ## [![Nodecraft Sponsorship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef67704ea76bfadc1a950915755dcb1b72300e24.jpeg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/stam1o) ## *All mods are the property of their respective owners, massive thank you to them, without them all of this wouldn't be possible! Special thanks to DevonG without him this wouldn't have been possible.
